greeting.text: Welcome, traveler. I don't see many visitors out here. What brings you to this rock?

choices.text: What can you tell me about this place?

trade_talk.text: I've got supplies, fuel cells, and a few... specialty items. Nothing comes cheap out here though.

specialty_items.text: Modified thruster coils, pre-war nav data, the occasional alien artifact. Don't ask where I get them.

artifacts.text: Found deep in derelict stations. Strange alloys, unknown inscriptions. Collectors pay well, but handling them... changes people. Or so they say.

local_info.text: This outpost sits at the edge of contested space. Three factions claim it, none defend it. Makes it perfect for trade, terrible for sleeping soundly.

choices.text: Sounds like opportunity. What do you sell?

factions.text: The Hegemony wants order, the Free Traders want profit, and the Remnant just want to be left alone. Pick your friends carefully out here.

farewell.text: Safe travels. The void doesn't forgive carelessness.
